introSection: Marienkäfer Hochbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Churpfalzpark in Loifling, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a ladybug.

fullText:
Marienkäfer Hochbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Churpfalzpark in Loifling, Bavaria, Germany.



Red track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a ladybug.
